title: MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS - 211info
text: MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS MARY'S RIVER GLEANERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Members glean food from fields and orchards and collect both food and non-food items donated by stores and markets. The food is distributed weekly through the participating efforts of its members. Incontinence supplies are available. Firewood for heating fuel is often available. Accepting donations of hygiene products such as toothbrushes, toothpaste, shampoo, conditioner, soap, and body wash. 1300 Philomath Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Distribution: Saturday 11:30am-2pm. Gleaning hours vary. (541) 497-9019 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 497-9019 Main phone Main phone (541) 497-9019 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Application must be completed. FEES: $30 annually and 8 hours per month volunteering. No one is turned away for inability to pay. Hours are mandatory unless unable to perform duties due to disability. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Discounted Heating Fuel Food Cooperatives Food Gleaning Programs Incontinence Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
